name: point-pulse
description: Greenfield Point app — UI + API entirely in .point, hosted on Vercel.

scripts.build:point: point build-ts src/app.point generated/app.ts && point build --production src/app.point generated/app.js && cp generated/app.ts generated/app.tsx
scripts.build: point check src/app.point && bun run build:point && bun run build:ui
